name: Hearty Beef Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can DINTY MOORE Beef Stew (40 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Pour stew into a 2-quart round casserole dish.
3. Place the pie crust directly on top of the stew.
4. Fold the edges under and flute as desired.
5. Sprinkle with cheese and parsley.
6. Make 2 or 3 slits in the crust.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the stew is thoroughly heated.
8. Serves 5.
